tech_news.title: Anker’s 160W Prime Charger can power three devices at once, and it’s $50 off - The Verge
tech_news.description: Anker’s 160W Prime Charger is down to $99.99 for Amazon’s Big Spring Sale. The USB-C charger can power up three devices at once, including beefier laptops.

tech_news.title: App that makes your Mac “moan” goes viral after earning $5K in 3 days - Dexerto
tech_news.description: A Mac app that “moans” when you slap your laptop has gone viral online, with its creator claiming it pulled in thousands of dollars just days after launch.

tech_news.title: It Sucks to Work in the Video-Game Industry Right Now - Bloomberg.com
tech_news.description: Even developers who successfully release big hits, like Fortnite and Battlefield , are losing their jobs

tech_news.title: Review: Crimson Desert PC: Changing Just One Setting Dramatically Boosts Frame-Rate - Digital Foundry
All-new Star Fox and Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake reportedly set for Switch 2 release this year - Eurogamer
tech_news.description: Nintendo reportedly has great plans to tap into (and benefit from) our nostalgia this year.

tech_news.title: Apple has finally discontinued the Mac Pro desktop after years of fitful effort - Ars Technica
tech_news.description: M2 Ultra Mac Pro is no longer for sale, and Apple says no replacement is planned.

tech_news.title: All iPhone 18 models might offer key design change, per leaker - 9to5Mac
tech_news.description: A new leak indicates that one of iPhone 18 Pro’s rumored design changes—a smaller Dynamic Island—will apply to more iPhone 18 models too.

tech_news.title: Sony hikes PS5 prices by up to $150 citing 'pressures' in global economy - CNBC
tech_news.description: Sony, like other console makers, is contending with surging memory chip prices which have forced the company to raise prices.

tech_news.title: Android 17 Beta 3 finally restores the single tap Wi-Fi toggle - 9to5Google
tech_news.description: Google has decided to restore the ability to enable and disable Wi-Fi connections with a single tap of the QS toggle in Android 17 Beta 3.
